準備三月中考IELTS 順便分享下心得
目標係listening, reading 9.0
Writing & speaking 8.0

今日研究下 傾下listening
之後會再每part慢慢討論
有問題 一齊討論下

Listening
今日講下最簡單既listening先
綜合咗好多網上既貼士同攻略
知己知彼 百戰百勝

首先了解咗考試形式先
30分鐘播碟 + 10分鐘抄答案落答題紙
有4個部份，總共40題
錄音只播一次

播每一個部份之前都會有講解一下個狀況，例如: 你將會聽到一個係語言學校既對話。 You are now going to listen to a conversation in a language school. Peter is registering for a course and talking to a lady at the student services counter.

之後會叫你睇題目，read question 1-6
有時，第1至5題係第1,2頁
而第6題係第三頁 要揭去第3頁
所以要留意清楚播呢段錄音要答幾多條

播錄音之前會有20-30秒俾你睇題目
呢個時候 有標題睇標題
大概係關於咩 會有咩人講野
之後睇問題 間低重點
再睇下有咩答案簡 全部睇哂
無答案簡就睇下要答咩 大概估下


常見題材 (Common topics)
第一部份
兩個人既日常對話
例如: 電話對談，租車，餐廳訂位，酒店預訂，報讀課程，約人見面，討論電視節目，旅行計劃，投訴

第二部份
一人獨白 (日常生活)
例如: 導遊介紹地方，介紹慈善機構/公司，廣告，節目/電台主持清談，餐廳介紹，講解規則

第三部份
三至四人對話 (學術性)
例如: 學術討論，討論功課，事業選擇

第四部分
一人獨白 (學術)
例如: 演講，講座


問題種類 (Question types)
1. Short answer question/ sentence completion/ summary completion
2. Form/ table/ note completion
3. Diagram/ map/ flow chart
4. Matching

注意事項
1. MC要幾多個答案
A)一個
B)幾個 (幾個1分)
C)幾個 (1個答案1分)

MC既答案就咁寫a/b/c/d就得
例如 a) summer
就咁寫a 就得 唔洗寫a)summer

2. 字數限制
No more than 3 words
咁就最多只可以寫三個字

No more than 2 words and/or a number
最多兩個字同一個號碼
例如: 60 black bags

3. 大楷 細楷
簡好用大楷，成份卷都要大楷
如果用細楷，小心人名同地方名。
例如: Mr. Brown/ Hong Kong

4. 數字
可以寫 five 或者 5
如果寫五百萬，可以寫 5 million

16/60
好多人都聽唔清楚係sixteen定sixty
其他 13/30, 14/40, 15/50, 17/70, 18/80,19/90都係

5. 唔可以用縮寫
例如 they are (x they're)

6. Spelling
有無串錯？ 有無s?

7. 時間
同一個時間通常有兩個講法
例如: 1:50
One fifty
Ten to two = ten minutes to two o'clock

8. Grammar
如果係short answer/填充既，大概可以check下grammar有無錯

Subject verb agreement
例如: .... are playing.
咁個答案一定係眾數
如果個答案係The girl 咁一定有s 即係the girls

To infinitive / +ing
例如: I want to ... English.
通常to之後都係跟個base form
咁個答案係learn 唔會係learning

另外，Short answer/fill in the gap都大概可以9估下個答案既
例如: He would like to meet ...
A) 跟at
He would like to meet at ...
答案可能係
i) 時間: 5pm
ii) part of the day/week: noon/ weekend
iii) 地方: the station

B) 跟in
He would like to meet in ...
i) 時間: 2 hours/ 2minutes
ii) 月份: May
iii) 年: 2018
iv) 季節: summer

C) 跟on
He would like to meet on ...
i) 星期: Monday
ii) 日期: 1st May

D) 無
He would like to meet ...
i) now/ immediately
ii) 人名: Mary / (with) Mary

另外，例如個答案係hospital
如果係短答，個答案就咁hospital就得
但填充就要留意grammar
例如: The best place to meet is at the hospital.

陷阱
1. 五時花 六時變
明明講好咗7點係地鐵站見，之後會同你講不如七點半見啦
通常都會講哂所有選擇出黎，跟住到最後先話你知想點

最後既小貼士
1. IELTS listening無得懶 多聽
主要口音係英國口音
可以去聽多啲BBC news/ 英劇
其次可以聽下TED talk

其他口音係 澳洲/美國/加拿大/新西蘭/愛爾蘭同歐洲國家

2. 唔好留空任何一格 因為答錯唔會扣分

3. 答案係順住問題出現

Reading

時間: 60mins
問題: 40條
文章: 3篇 (Academic)
文章來源: 書籍、刊物、雜誌同報紙
因為文章無特定讀者，所以術語一定會有簡單淺白既解釋。

呢個分兩個部分講
1. General strategy
2. Question types and examples


今日講part 1 先

基本要注意既事項 (其實同listening有啲似)
•睇題目
•字數限制 (No more than 3 words and/or a number from the passage, one word only, no more than 2 words)
•唔會出縮寫(例如: they've)
•連字計一個字 (例如: ice-cream)
•串字
•文法 (眾數, subject verb agreement,etc)
•無扣分 (唔好留空)
•答案通常搬字過紙 (may use your own word)

咁reading其實要考你既係...
•識唔識搵主旨、重點同細節
•明唔明邏輯論述
•睇唔睇到作者既意見、態度同目的


最常用到既閱讀技巧有
a) Skimming略讀
b) Scanning細看

a) Skimming 略讀
呢個係好快咁睇篇文去了解篇文既主題/概念
重點係 快!
有幾種方法
1. 好快咁睇哂成篇文 唔係慢慢讀 唔洗好仔細咁讀
2. 睇第一段同最後一段
3. 睇每一段既第一句同最後一句
4. 睇標題、副標題同圖解

練習方法 (特別係slow readers)
練習！ 練習！ 練習！
睇咗好多建議都係叫練習 讀多啲 無捷徑
開始既時候可以隨便簡任何既英文文章讀
重點係你要對篇文講既野興趣 去培養閱讀既習慣
接近考試既日子就開始睇英文雜誌、報紙、刊物同書 (基上係考試文章既類型)
睇下past paper 熟習考試題目同問題
(臨急抱佛腳既朋友就係咁煲past paper啦)
睇文每日30分鐘就夠 持之以恆
你就會開始讀得快！

b) Scanning 細看
呢個係搵指定既資料 (specific information)
原理就好似你查字典咁
例如要查persistence
你大概知佢係邊 唔會花時間由A開始睇

做法係睇完題目 知道去搵咩keywords/ideas
例如: how much is an apple?
咁你大概都知要搵數字同埋有可能有貨幣符號

注意: 問題既keyword 同 文章既keyword通常會係同義詞 唔會用同一個字
例如: misconception => mistaken views
International standards => worldwide regulations


貼士:
1. 當你略讀既時候，可以間低指定資訊
例如: 人名、地方名同機構
當你之後要搵 就可以快啲搵到

2. 唔好因爲副標題個keyword同問題既keyword一樣而被誤導。要知道個段既意思，咁可以用skimming略讀第三點。睇個段既第一句同最後一句，因為普遍都會係好似咁 ...

Let's start with the main point of this paragraph. Bla bla bla bla bla bla bla bla bla bla bla bla bla bla bla bla bla bla bla bla bla bla bla bla bla bla bla bla bla bla bla bla bla bla bla bla bla bla bla bla bla so my main point again.

中文版:
我好鍾意屌人老母。啦啦啦啦啦啦啦啦啦啦啦啦啦啦啦啦啦啦啦啦啦啦啦啦啦啦啦啦啦啦啦啦啦啦。
所以我屌你老母！

大概我自己既做法係
1. 睇問題
2. 略讀成篇文、 間低重點、圈數字
3. 再睇問題
4. 搵答案

聽日打得哂就講問題種類同例子
Happy revision!

問題種類

Reading係考你讀野既技巧 唔係考你知識

大概講下有咩類型既問題啦
大路既技巧 睇返基本攻略就得
未睇既 睇咗先
最重要係 閱讀速度 同 詞彙
呢份試卷快既半個鐘做得哂
不過 讀得快 但唔明都無用
所以 無得懶 都係個句
Practice Practice Practice (練習啦 屌你老母)
每日搵野讀下30分鐘

1. MC題
•考你明唔明主要意思 同識唔識搵指定資料
•有幾種 (四選一、五選二同六選三)
•問題有兩種型式
a) 完成句子
例子: Farmers in England
A)
B)
C)
D)

b) 答問題
例子: Which one of the following increased in Australia?
A)唔關事既答案 文章提都無提過
B)相反既答案
C)文章有講過，但而家唔係問你呢樣
D)正確答案

•寫英文字母就得 (A. Summer 就咁寫A)
•睇清楚題目，條問題究竟係問乜
•略睇問題同答案 => 再間低key words => 搵答案

貼士:
•搵同義詞，keywords未必會出現
•用消除法 (删走錯既選擇)
•問題係跟文章個flow 第二條答案一定係第一同第三個答案之間
•篇文講既就係啱既
例如:篇文話你老母係男人，咁你就要答係男人

例子:

睇問題同選擇先
Question 1: Which one of the following increased in New Zealand after 1984?
a) farm incomes
b) use of fertiliser
c) over-stocking
d) farm diversification

Keywords有咩？
我見到increase, New Zealand 同after 1984
咁可以有變化既字就係increase
Increase有咩同義詞呢？
Grow, rise, expand
再快速睇下有咩簡
哦！ 有收入、肥料、存貨過量同多元化
唔識啲字 唔撚驚 睇下篇文先

好！搵到一段有勁多keywords
In the late 1980s and early 1990s some efforts were made to reduce farm subsidies. The most dramatic example was that of New Zealand, which scrapped most farm support in 1984. A study of the environmental effects, conducted in 1993, found that the end of fertiliser subsidies had been followed by a fall in fertiliser use (a fall compounded by the decline in world commodity prices, which cut farm incomes). The removal of subsidies also stopped land-clearing and over-stocking, which in the past had been the principal causes of erosion. Farms began to diversify.

咁再睇返有咩選擇先

Farm incomes- cut喎
咁唔會係啦

Fall in fertiliser use
肥料使用下降咗 問題問增加
咁唔識肥料唔緊要啦
b又係錯既

C呢 over stocking stopped
咁停咗 就即係錯啦

所以就得返D
答案就係Farms began to diversify
雖然無出現increase既同義詞
但開始咗 所以就係增加

真係考個陣係好鐘意fake9你
個d keyword會係咁出現
你以為搵到佢 其實下一段先啱
唔好見到keywords就狗衝
所以文盲既巴絲要睇清楚keywords前後係講咩！
呢個就係我做reading既思路

2. 真/假/無提
•有兩種
a) Yes/ No/ Not Given (意見)
b) True/ False/ Not Given (事實)

•最大問題係Not Given
通常就算篇文無講過 都會9up下等你以爲自己痴線
大概就係搵唔到就係無講過
例子:
文中: Apple is healthy.
Q. Apple is good for you.
True

Apple is healthy.
Q. Apple is bad for you.
False

Apple is healthy.
Q. Apple is red.
Not given
呢個你明知蘋果係紅色
但篇文無講過都要答Not Given
呢個通常係最難既一部分


•注意字眼
例子1: some, all, mainly, often, always, occasionally
呢啲字係考你有無成句睇
Coca-Cola has always made its drinks in USA.
Coca-Cola has mainly made its drinks in USA.
兩句其實差一個字，個意思已經唔同咗

例子2: suggest, claim, believe, know
The man claimed he was a British citizen.
The man is a British citizen.

3. 短答題
•最簡單 同時亦係最易失分
•字數限制 講咗好多次 睇清楚可以寫幾多隻字
•通常問wh questions (when, what, where, who etc)

例如:
問題係
Where do most employees collect their wages?
文中提及
"Generally employees pick up checks in their department"
答案呢
Their apartment
原來係唔需要包括埋preposition

貼士:
•搬字過紙
•答案順住出
•應該就唔需要連字(e.g. E-book)或者 縮寫 (e.g. She'd)

4. 填充題
•table/ flow chart/ diagram/ note/ sentence/ form/ summary
•有兩種
a)有選擇 b)無選擇
有選擇既答案 會用文章既同義詞 唔會用一樣既字
無選擇既 就好似短答咁 同埋有字數限制

要留意文法

5. 配對題 matching headings to paragraph/matching opinions to sources
•最難 同 最花時間 (因為有太多野要睇 太少時間)
•千其唔好只係睇每段第一句同最後一句
略讀每段 => 決定個主意係咩
點解個作者要寫？
分別出個段既重點同輔助資料
輔助資料係去支持個重點
只係睇個段第一同最尾個句就get唔到個段既意思

•標題既選擇一定會多過你要既答案
•睇哂所有標題 再間低重點
•略讀成篇文章 間低重點

•唔好因爲標題同個段有相同既keywords就以為係啱

但係我做極FIB/match info to paragraph都係係咁錯

屌 啱啦 今日就係睇matching有咩tips
屌以為無撚用 咁盡量今晚或者聽日出

Speaking

講咗計分方式先

計分有四個標準
1. 流暢度同連貫性
2. 詞彙
3. 文法廣度同準確度
4. 發音

1. 流暢度同連貫性
•流暢
流唔流暢？
會唔會講得好慢？
會唔會重複講 講過既野？
可唔可以自然用到話語標記？(well, I mean, so, to begin with)

•連貫
有無答到條問題？
係咪言之有理？
有無離題？

9分:
流利地講到 好少重覆或改正
停頓 唔係諗字或者諗文法
連貫地講到 用連接詞去連貫令到通順
充分同適當咁發展個話題

7分:
基本上無明顯既唔連貫
會因為詞彙停頓、有重複同自我改正
有用連接詞同話語標記

5分:
基本上可以保持到個flow 但會重複、自我更正同講得慢
濫用一啲連接詞同話語標記
可以流利地使用簡單句子 但用複雜啲既句子會影響流暢度

2. 詞彙
用既多數係咪基本既詞彙？
有無夾雜一啲唔常用既詞彙？
用得正唔正確？
有無唔同詞彙去表達唔同意思？

9分:
係所有話題上
精確、靈活使用詞彙
自然、準確運用成語

7分:
係大部分話題上
可以靈活地使用詞彙
用到一啲唔常見既成語/詞彙
明白唔同既說話風格同配搭 但有用錯既時候
有效地paraphrase

5:
能夠係熟悉同唔熟悉既話題上講到 但詞彙上會有限
唔太靈活
嘗試paraphrase 但有時得 有時唔得

3. 文法廣度同準確度
•語法廣度
識唔識用簡單句子同複合句？
有無用唔同既時態？

•準確度
語法啱唔啱？
(Plural, subject-verb agreement, tense, pronouns)

9分:
靈活、自然地使用a full range of structures
正確使用(有犯到英語為母語都會犯既錯)

7分:
用到複雜既structures 但唔算太靈活
雖然有語法既錯誤 但可以流利地講到無錯既句子

5分:
有簡單句子 合理既準確度
有限既複雜句子 但通常都有錯 而且難理解

4. 發音
•語音
係咪容易聽得明？

•節奏
語調係咪自然？
重音位啱唔啱？
停頓位啱唔啱？

9分:
Full range of pronunciation features
(Individual sounds, word stress, sentence stress, weak sounds, intonation)
精確
靈活運用
輕鬆地聽得明你講咩

8分:
Wide range of pronunciation features
偶有失誤
容易聽得明，但母語有少少影響

6分:
A range of pronunciation features
有時候有效運用 但唔係好保持到
基本上聽得明 但有時發錯音/讀錯字 所以會唔清晰

是咪TOEFL太易？

睇咗幾個網都話無分別
Ielts係由university of Cambridge, British council 同idp共同擁有
只係邊個監考 因為份卷係一樣
考官都係用同一個方法訓練出黎
不過 唔排除有考官會鬆手啲或者嚴啲

Speaking

1. Interview
2. Talk
3. Discussion

1. Interview
考官會先自我介紹 再確認你既身分
之後就會開始問基本既問題
例如: 屋企、屋企人、工作、學業、興趣

呢part可以叫考官重複條問題 但考官唔可以解釋條問題


2. Talk
考官會俾張task card你
你有一分鐘去諗同寫低notes
跟住就要講一至二分鐘
講完 考官就會問一、兩條問題

考官會嚴格地控制時間

3. Discussion
考官會問一啲同第二part有關既抽象問題同概念

呢part如果唔明，可以叫考官解釋條問題



貼士:
1. 流暢度勝過一切 (講得流暢好過浪費時間去諗一個最好既字)，雖然講得越多越好，但切忌重複。
2. 唔好背答案(考官好容易會發現你背答案)
3. 爭取時間 (其實考試好少會明哂所有野，就算明哂，你都可能需要時間去組織下) 最初級既就係重複條問題，不過最好既方法係讚美下條問題
例: I've never considered that before but it is an interesting question
4. 如果有唔明既，唔好緊張，誠實地問/要求解釋。呢個可以表現到你既能力去溝通。
例: I'm sorry, could you please explain?
Would you mind clarifying?
5. 講幾多？
有幾多講幾多，最重要係生動、有趣。唔係係咁重複

6. 講錯點算？
如果你可以好快、好流利地更正自己既，就改 (表現到你有意識同控制到)
如果唔係好識點自如咁更正既，就算。

7. 諗法
你自己既諗法其實幾重要，至少對你有印象
學下一啲片語/字去表達自己
唔好句句都 "I think, I think"
例: I feel, I like, I prefer
(之後再講解)

8. 文法
問題同答案個時態係咪match?
例: What was it like?
It was...

9. 第一印象
雖然呢個唔係計分準則之一，但網上面話你乾乾淨淨好過又油又臭咁去考。
眼神接觸
輕鬆、自然、有活力
始終係個考官俾分你，留低一個好印象

之後再詳細講下個啲discourse markers, time fillers之類個啲
如果其他有咩想詳細講既，講低一齊諗下
開始有啲唔知點溫好

Sentence structure

1. Simple sentence
•1 clause
•Subject + Verb (主語+動詞)
•1個main verb
•用作 表達一個理念

例:
1. I love John.
2. She sings.
3. They are playing games.
4. The train was late.

Main verb
•係指表達時態個個動詞
•underline咗個個就係

2. Compound sentence
•2or more clauses
•2 simple sentences
•兩個主意係平等
如果拎走咗其中一句，另一句句子係可以獨立表達到意思。
•由連接詞串連
例: and, but, so, nor, for, or, yet

例:
句1) I like bananas.
句2) I like grapes.
結合) I like bananas and grapes.

句1) I ate breakfast.
句2) My brother did not eat breakfast.
結合) I ate breakfast but my brother did not.

註:
1)通常被濫用
2)通常顯示唔到幾多呢兩句既關係
例如and將兩個句子串連，但顯示唔到呢兩句有咩邏輯上既關係
3)如果寫作上出現太多呢類型既句子，應該要檢查下係咪可以用到complex sentences.

* 對等連接詞
For, And, Nor, But, Or, Yet, So
簡單咁記係fanboys (每個字既第一個字母)
連接對等既單字、片語或子句


3. Complex sentence
•main clause(主要子句) + connective + subordinate clause (附屬子句)
•附屬子句
一定要附屬連接詞 帶住
唔可能成為一個獨立而完整既句子
可以放係主要子句前面，但一定要有逗號分開兩個子句
例: Because Mary and Tom arrived before noon, I did not see them.
•呢類型既句子更清晰同仔細咁表示到句子主要部分既關係
例: before 表達事情發生既先後

•可以分成 7 種 附屬連接詞
功用: 連接主要子句同附屬子句

a) Contrast:
although, though, even though, while
b) Reason:
because, since, everywhere
c) Place:
where, wherever, everywhere
d) Purpose:
so that, so... because +want
e) Result:
so that, so... that, such... that
f) Time:
when, before, after, since, while, as, as soon as, by the time, until
g) Conditional:
if, unless, provided (that), as long as

例
1)Her father died when she was very young.
2)She had a difficult childhood because her father died when she was very young.
3)Although she has always lived in France, she speaks fluent English.
4)Although she has always lived in France, she speaks fluent English because her mother is American and her father is Spanish.

紅色 - main clause 主句
黃色 - subordinating conjunctive 附屬連接詞
綠色 - subordinate clause子句
粉紅 - coordinate conjunctive 對等連接詞

Speaking

* 自然
(用自己識既字，背完一啲好勁既字，又要記埋用法。發錯音或者用錯又會被扣分)
* 講大話
記住呢個考試係睇你英文有幾好
吹下水 有需要既時候講下大話
等自己可以有多啲嘢講
* 講趣聞軼事、自己經歷
Part1同2可以盡量分享多啲自己既野
但part3就唔好剩係講自己，因為係概括地講喺你國家既人或者係全世界
* 呢個考試suppose係兩個人既正常對話
原本以為係formal，因為始終係考試
但其實係Semi-formal，所以避免用太過formal既字或者書面語(例: moreover, futhermore)，但都唔好用slangs或者太informal既字


* Fillers
呢啲有需要sip下時間，用得太多就會好唔自然

-filler sounds:
Umm, uh, ah, mmm, hmmm

-filler words:
Basically, actually, literally,well, so

-filler phrases:
I think that..., you know, what I'm trying to say is..., let me think, that's a tough/difficult one, I've never really thought about that, that's a tricky/good/interesting question, I guess, I suppose.


* Speaking 必勝思路
呢個我覺得幾有用！
基本上好多問題都啱用
其實好啲似諗到咩就講
我睇啲例子 啲人真係好吹得

Q: What type of weather do you enjoy most?

A:
開頭 Opening (Optional):
Hmmm... it's hard to say because I like all seasons but ...

答案 Answer:
I would say summer would have to be my-all-time favourite.

原因/例子 Reason/Example:
You know, summer is just great. There are so many things to do outside, you can be near the water, yes, if it's too hot, it's better to hang out at the beach. I really love the beach and water sports like surfing.

總結 Close:
So yeah. If I had to choose one, it would be summer for sure.


* 唔識答，點算？
千其唔好放棄！
❌ I don't know. I can't answer.
✅ hmmm... that's a tricky question. Let me think about that... yeah... I guess I would say...

作左篇文 Writing Task 1

You are studying a short course in another country. Your accommodation was arranged by the course provider. There is a major problem with the accommodation.
Write a letter to the course provider. In your letter,
· say what the problem is
· describe the accommodation you thought you were getting
· ask the provider to solve the problem



Dear Mr. White,

I am Peter Parker. I have enrolled in the summer course of "ABC" college to study English. I am living in a sharehouse arranged by the school. The location is close to the campus. It helps me save traveling time and focus on study but a quiet environment is also very important to study, which the current accommodation cannot provide.

I am living with 3 other students. As they are having a summer break of their study. It seems that they are in a holiday mood. They came back very late and made a lot of noise. They even held overnight parties several times. I have been wake up by them in the mid-night frequently. My rest have been interrupted, so my study.

It is a big contrast to my expectation which was a quiet environment with dedicated students. That would benefit my study and experiences.

I am wondering if your could arrange me to live with my coursemates who share the same schedule and goals.

I am looking forward to your reply.

Yours sincerely,
Peter Parker

* "I am living" = I am sharing/ I share the apartment = synonym/ paraphrase
* My rest (= it = third person singular) My rest has been interrupted.
* so has my study = my study has been interrupted.
* As..., .... NOT As they are having a summer break of their study.
* You can use present continuous tense to complain about something that happens frequently. E.g. They are always arguing.
* describe the accommodation you thought you were getting - Although you have mentioned it in your third paragraph, it is rather weak in terms of task achievement.

Suggestion:
+ how to paraphrase.
+ use more complex sentence structures.
+ how to paragraph your letter
+ Subject verb agreement

- 最後想法



＊ 列舉 （詳細啲）
錯誤示範1:
Recent electronic gadgets have …
較好既答案:
Electronic gadgets such as smartphones, laptops and 3 D printers have drastically increased worker productivity.

Serious diseases are recurring matter.

有用句子：
1. This essay will analyse this issue using examples from Canada and Australia to demonstrate points and support arguments.

2. It is undeniable that (problem) is one of the most challenging issues in the world.

3. For example, a recent study/ research by … showed …

4. There are also studies being performed on a global level to discover the source of these important problems. One solution proposed by the (global organisation) is to …

5. (The issue) of most countries has grown/ fallen in importance over the past few decades/ years.

6. Numerous studies have consistently found that …

7. To begin, email has made communication, especially abroad, simpler and faster, resulting in numerous benefits for commerce and business

8. Nevertheless, the effects of this new technology have not all been beneficial

9. In addition, the large size of the web has meant that it is nearly impossible to regulate and control.

10. [總結文章] In conclusion, developments in IT have brought many benefits, yet I believe developments relating to new technology are likely to produce many negative effects in the future [最後想法] that must be addressed if we are to avoid damaging impacts on individuals and society.




例子1: (雖然唔係perfect,但個flow係正路)
Q: Government investment in the visual arts, the kind you commonly see in art galleries, is a waste of money. Governments must invest this money in public services instead. To what extent do you agree with this statement?

e.g.
[重新描述問題] Many local governments spend large portions of their budget not only on public services, but also on the visual arts. [陳述意見] Although I agree that it is important to invest in local amenities, I do not think spending on the visual arts is a waste of money. [文章概要] This essay will discuss this issue using examples to support arguments and demonstrate points.

On the one hand, [陳述立場一] spending a significant amount of the government budget on public services is beneficial for society. [解釋立場] Providing for basic amenities, such as hospitals, roads and schools, helps to determine the quality of life that most citizens will have. [例子] For example, a recent survey by Education Today shows that countries that spend more on schools have a population that is higher in literacy, by 65%, compared to those that dedicate no money to education. [總結段落] Therefore, it is apparent that spending on public services is a worthwhile investment for a government.

[立場二] → [解釋] → [例子] → [總結段落]

[總結文章] To sum up, although there are clear benefits of ensuring a large amount of investment goes into public services, I do not believe spending money on the arts is a waste of money as this too provides important benefits. [最後想法] In the future, governments show consider budgeting for both.

You live in a room in college which you share with another student. You find it very difficult to work there because he or she always has friends visiting. They have parties in the room and sometimes borrow your things without asking you.

Write a letter to the Accommodation Officer at the college and ask for a new room next term. You would prefer a single room. Explain your reasons.


Dear Sir/Madam,

I am Peter Park and one of the students living in the rooms provided by the college. I am writing to express my dissatisfaction with my roommate and request a new room next term.

First, my roommate always bring friends to our room and have parties. He even invited three friends to our room and the night before the final exams. My concentration level was dropped by the noise that was made by them.

Moreover, my things have been disappeared and later I was told that he took them without my consent. My calculator was disappeared right before my mathematics class. I had to do the calculations? by bare hand during the lesson.

I am afraid that my academic result will drop due to the disturbances. It would be appreciated if you could arrange another room for me next term. A single room is preferred to avoid the same problem.

I am looking forward to hearing from you.

Yours faithfully,
Peter Parker

再用and連接

所以應該係
my roommate always brings friends to our room.
my roommate always has parties.

Some people think the technology make life complex so we should make our life simpler without using technology.

To what extent, do u agree or disagree??

It is often argued that technology complicates our life and we should not use the technology to have a simpler life. This essay will argue that despite the fact that there are disadvantages, the advantages of technology outweigh the disadvantages.

Technology plays an important role in our life that we have to use it in almost every aspect for higher efficiency and convenience. For examples, video meetings on computers and mobile devices have been a popular substitute of in-person meeting and electronic banking has replaced the paper work to clear credit card bills and borrow a loan. When I was in college, the intranet was the main method professors used to collect homework and distributes notes. The professor’s workload was reduced and student could have a faster response from the teachers.

Some critics say that our life is too complex with technology as it makes information available all the time, people is lack of the capacity to focus and relax. Therefore, we should go back to the old days without technology. However, it depends on personal references. People are the users of technology and they could turn it off anytime. Lots of people switch off their phone and refuse to receive calls and messages when sleeping and having holiday.

In conclusion, technology could keep people distracted and lead to a complex life but it is too essential in our daily life including work and education to save our time and boost efficiency. People should use it every day and control the portion of technology in their time. (257 words)

Many young people today leave school with a negative attitude towards learning. Why? What can be done to encourage a positive attitude to learning in young people?


The number of dropouts from school is large and many of them hold a negative attitude towards learning. The main reason behind the phenomenon is the different needs of student are neglected by the mainstream education. The Industrial-oriented education should be made an option to fulfill their needs.

Most students who left the school think traditional study is irrelevant to daily life and find study does not help them to get a job. The syllabuses of course are often pure theoretic or exam-oriented that leaning to prepare student for getting a place in universities and doing research. Teenagers who do not aim at tertiary education or being a researcher find study in school is a waste of their time. For example, students study skills to the skills to solve mathematics questions that they seldom use after graduation. Therefore, some of them are not willing to learn and quit study.

To tackle this problem, the government and schools should offer alternative courses which are occupation-orientated. The curricula of the courses equip the students for future workplace and hunting an entry position of the industry. The different needs of pupils could be catered and they are self-motivated to learn. For instances, teenagers who opted to join building-apprentice courses in Hong Kong, are found more driven than when they were in mainstream education.

In conclusion, traditional study does not suit all youngsters is the main reason why many young people leave school and are reluctant to study. Vocational studies should be advocated as an alternative to help them achieve their personal goals and they will have more incentives to learn. (267 words)

speaking盡量lead住個examiner
或者引導佢問你prep咗想講既嘢

首先
一分鐘內介紹自己 臨尾加一啲日常既嘢

例如
i like reading books in my spare time - 你睇過一本好睇既書
i like travelling around the world - 你去過最鍾意既一個地方
i like xxx in my spare time - 興趣
i would like to be a 7head in the future - 志願
+
一個影響倒你既人 （真係出名個個都識先好講；亦唔好講講下講政治嘢）

諗下點樣介紹同有咩可以講仔細啲

再
例如佢問你讀書番學有咩趣事 有咩活動參加過
你可以話 nothing really special, BUT 講番上面個堆嘢
i recently read a book about xxxxx,
i just went to xxxx, a really nice place
i do like xxxx
+
maybe i can share something about that

首先了解咗考試形式先
30分鐘播碟 + 10分鐘抄答案落答題紙
有4個部份，總共40題
錄音只播一次

播每一個部份之前都會有講解一下個狀況，例如: 你將會聽到一個係語言學校既對話。 You are now going to listen to a conversation in a language school. Peter is registering for a course and talking to a lady at the student services counter.

之後會叫你睇題目，read question 1-6
有時，第1至5題係第1,2頁
而第6題係第三頁 要揭去第3頁
所以要留意清楚播呢段錄音要答幾多條

播錄音之前會有20-30秒俾你睇題目
呢個時候 有標題睇標題
大概係關於咩 會有咩人講野
之後睇問題 間低重點
再睇下有咩答案簡 全部睇哂
無答案簡就睇下要答咩 大概估下


常見題材 (Common topics)
第一部份
兩個人既日常對話
例如: 電話對談，租車，餐廳訂位，酒店預訂，報讀課程，約人見面，討論電視節目，旅行計劃，投訴

第二部份
一人獨白 (日常生活)
例如: 導遊介紹地方，介紹慈善機構/公司，廣告，節目/電台主持清談，餐廳介紹，講解規則

第三部份
三至四人對話 (學術性)
例如: 學術討論，討論功課，事業選擇

第四部分
一人獨白 (學術)
例如: 演講，講座


問題種類 (Question types)
1. Short answer question/ sentence completion/ summary completion
2. Form/ table/ note completion
3. Diagram/ map/ flow chart
4. Matching

注意事項
1. MC要幾多個答案
A)一個
B)幾個 (幾個1分)
C)幾個 (1個答案1分)

MC既答案就咁寫a/b/c/d就得
例如 a) summer
就咁寫a 就得 唔洗寫a)summer

2. 字數限制
No more than 3 words
咁就最多只可以寫三個字

No more than 2 words and/or a number
最多兩個字同一個號碼
例如: 60 black bags

3. 大楷 細楷
簡好用大楷，成份卷都要大楷
如果用細楷，小心人名同地方名。
例如: Mr. Brown/ Hong Kong

4. 數字
可以寫 five 或者 5
如果寫五百萬，可以寫 5 million

16/60
好多人都聽唔清楚係sixteen定sixty
其他 13/30, 14/40, 15/50, 17/70, 18/80,19/90都係

5. 唔可以用縮寫
例如 they are (x they're)

6. Spelling
有無串錯？ 有無s?

7. 時間
同一個時間通常有兩個講法
例如: 1:50
One fifty
Ten to two = ten minutes to two o'clock

8. Grammar
如果係short answer/填充既，大概可以check下grammar有無錯

Subject verb agreement
例如: .... are playing.
咁個答案一定係眾數
如果個答案係The girl 咁一定有s 即係the girls

To infinitive / +ing
例如: I want to ... English.
通常to之後都係跟個base form
咁個答案係learn 唔會係learning

另外，Short answer/fill in the gap都大概可以9估下個答案既
例如: He would like to meet ...
A) 跟at
He would like to meet at ...
答案可能係
i) 時間: 5pm
ii) part of the day/week: noon/ weekend
iii) 地方: the station

B) 跟in
He would like to meet in ...
i) 時間: 2 hours/ 2minutes
ii) 月份: May
iii) 年: 2018
iv) 季節: summer

C) 跟on
He would like to meet on ...
i) 星期: Monday
ii) 日期: 1st May

D) 無
He would like to meet ...
i) now/ immediately
ii) 人名: Mary / (with) Mary

另外，例如個答案係hospital
如果係短答，個答案就咁hospital就得
但填充就要留意grammar
例如: The best place to meet is at the hospital.
